name: Teamwork Spaces
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Teamwork Spaces
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Teamwork Spaces with DocsBot
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Teamwork Spaces to answer questions, retrieve documentation, summarize knowledge, and support safe internal workflows.
intro: Teamwork Spaces helps teams organize and share company knowledge, and DocsBot Skill Builder helps you turn that knowledge into practical AI actions. In plain language, you can describe the support or internal workflow you want, and Skill Builder designs, secures, tests, and deploys a reusable Skill. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions, look up content, summarize documentation, and take approved follow-up actions for customers or employees.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent search Teamwork Spaces articles and return the most relevant answer inside a website chat or helpdesk reply.
Use Teamwork Spaces content to generate concise troubleshooting steps, policy explanations, or onboarding guidance tailored to the customer’s question.
Have the agent summarize related Teamwork Spaces pages into a clean handoff note when a support case needs human escalation.
Enable the agent to gather missing context from the customer, then use Teamwork Spaces to assemble a more precise answer from multiple internal or public knowledge pages.
Allow the agent to prepare a ticket response draft grounded in Teamwork Spaces documentation and include linked source references for support teams to review.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or an internal chat interface to find answers across Teamwork Spaces without manually searching through documentation.
Help customer success, operations, or onboarding teams ask the agent for summarized SOPs, process documentation, or policy guidance stored in Teamwork Spaces.
Enable teams to chat with the agent to collect knowledge from multiple Teamwork Spaces pages and turn it into a meeting brief, checklist, or internal handoff summary.
Support internal research workflows where employees ask the agent to compare related Teamwork Spaces documents and highlight differences, missing details, or next steps.
Give teams an AI assistant that retrieves the right Teamwork Spaces content, follows approved workflow instructions, and helps complete repeatable internal procedures more consistently.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that answers product and policy questions from Teamwork Spaces content.
A private employee assistant that finds SOPs and summarizes internal documentation on demand.
A ticket reply helper that drafts responses using approved Teamwork Spaces knowledge.
An escalation assistant that creates concise handoff notes from customer conversations and relevant documentation.
A documentation research agent that compares related Teamwork Spaces pages and highlights key differences.
An onboarding assistant that guides new customers or employees using curated Teamwork Spaces knowledge paths.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Teamwork Spaces agent to do, such as answer support questions, summarize documentation, or prepare handoffs, and it translates that goal into a reusable Skill design.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it safely
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder decides the secure workflow, identifies the required connection details and configuration values, protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime settings, and scopes access to the minimum content, actions, and users needed.

howItWorks.title: Guardrails are added
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds approval boundaries, safe action limits, and clear instructions so the agent can retrieve information or take bounded actions without exceeding the permissions and policies you define.

howItWorks.title: Automated testing improves it
howItWorks.description: The built-in testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, weak instructions, missing checks, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated self-improvement loop before launch.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once ready, Skill Builder helps publish the Skill to your customer-facing DocsBot chat widget, helpdesk agent, or private employee agent so teams can start using Teamwork Spaces through natural conversation.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent for Teamwork Spaces?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the outcome you want in plain language, and it creates a Skill that can search, summarize, and use Teamwork Spaces content inside a DocsBot agent. Skill Builder also handles secure connection setup, scoped permissions, testing, and deployment guidance.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Teamwork Spaces data to answer customer questions?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use Teamwork Spaces as a trusted knowledge source to retrieve relevant content, summarize answers, and prepare support replies or escalation notes. You can define what knowledge the agent may access and where approval boundaries should apply.

faq.question: What workflows can an internal AI assistant automate with Teamwork Spaces?
faq.answer: An internal DocsBot agent can help employees find SOPs, summarize policies, compare documentation, assemble handoff notes, and support repeatable knowledge-driven workflows. It can be made available in private chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams for faster internal help.

faq.question: Can DocsBot safely connect Teamwork Spaces to AI actions?
faq.answer: DocsBot Skill Builder is designed to connect services safely by defining required configuration values, protecting secrets through secure runtime handling, and keeping credentials out of chats and generated content. It also scopes access and adds approval controls for more sensitive workflows.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot agent summarize multiple Teamwork Spaces pages into one answer?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot agent can gather relevant information from multiple Teamwork Spaces pages and turn it into a concise answer, brief, checklist, or handoff summary. This is useful for both customer support and internal team research.

faq.question: How does testing work for a Teamwork Spaces AI Skill?
faq.answer: DocsBot includes an automated testing agent that runs realistic support and internal scenarios against the Skill, identifies bugs or weak spots, and supports an automated improvement loop before deployment. That helps the final agent behave more reliably in real conversations.

brand.title: Teamwork
brand.description: Teamwork.com is a project management platform that combines powerful project management with streamlined operations, designed for managing client projects profitably. Headquartered in Cork, Ireland, the company was founded by a team with agency experience and has grown to serve over 20,000 customers worldwide with a global team of over 350 employees.
brand.slogan: Streamline teamwork, boost productivity, and manage projects profitably worldwide.
